title: Match candle colors to cake decoration theme

requirements.text: Update the candle rendering in the BirthdayCake component to dynamically style candle colors and appearance to harmonize with the overall cake decoration theme, ensuring visual cohesion between the candles and the cake design

quotes: Match the styles or colour of the candle accordingly to the overall decoration of the cake

acceptanceCriteria: Candle colors complement the cake's color scheme
Candle styling (shape, size, decorative elements) matches the cake's decorative theme
Visual consistency is maintained between lit and extinguished candle states
The flame colors harmonize with the candle and cake color palette

constraints: Do not modify the existing cake image asset
Preserve the candle blowing interaction functionality
Maintain the lit/extinguished state toggle behavior
nonGoals: Changing the overall page layout or structure
